title: Tart Ricotta Cannoli
description: An Italian dessert made with flaky pastry, ricotta filling, and a sweet tart crust.
instructions: Roll out the pastry dough and cut into circles of about 4 inches in diameter.
Bake the pastry shells for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
Allow the shells to cool completely on a wire rack.
In a large bowl, combine the ricotta cheese, granulated sugar, and vanilla extract.
Mix the filling ingredients until smooth and creamy.
Spoon the ricotta filling into the cooled pastry shells.
Dust the tops with confectioners' sugar before serving.
